response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable contributions to developer tooling and open-source projects, but lacks explicit, recent experience with Java/Kotlin IDE tooling, Spring ecosystem, or JVM internals — key requirements for this role. His DLang and TypeScript focus, while impressive, doesn't directly align with the enterprise JVM tooling focus.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions with developer tooling projects (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, GISCollective)
Proven ability to work on complex systems across stacks, including low-latency and real-time applications
Demonstrated passion for IDEs and tooling via workshops on web internals and testing practices
concerns: No recent or explicit experience with Java/Kotlin IDE development or JVM internals
Lack of demonstrated work with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise application servers
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with Java mentioned only in early roles
